mapper.select: SELECT id, post_id, user_id, content, parent_id, like_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM comments WHERE id = #{id} AND status != 0
SELECT id, post_id, user_id, content, parent_id, like_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM comments WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND parent_id IS NULL AND status != 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, post_id, user_id, content, parent_id, like_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM comments WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND status != 0 ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND status != 0
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE comments SET status = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE status != 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE status != 0 AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET status = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{commentId}
